Home / Service Areas / Fernandina Beach

Power-washing in Fernandina Beach, FL

Trusted local professionals serving Fernandina Beach and surrounding communities

Serving Fernandina Beach, FL

Apex Power Washing provides top-tier exterior cleaning services in historic Fernandina Beach, where Victorian architecture meets modern beach living. Our gentle cleaning methods preserve the intricate details of century-old homes while effectively removing salt residue and beachfront grime. We're experts at maintaining both the charming historic district properties and contemporary oceanfront homes, using appropriate pressure levels for each surface type. The salty ocean air accelerates weathering on siding, fences, and outdoor furniture, but our protective treatments create a barrier against the elements. From cleaning the iconic shrimp boat fleet at the harbor to refreshing historic downtown storefronts, we understand Fernandina Beach's unique cleaning needs. Our eco-friendly solutions safely remove stubborn stains from brick walkways, wooden porches, and seaside decks without harming the local ecosystem. Trust our experienced team to enhance your property's beauty while respecting the character of this beloved island community.

Fernandina Beach's Victorian homes and maritime industry create distinct cleaning challenges requiring specialized approaches.

Power-washing Services in Fernandina Beach

Residential Power Washing

Complete exterior cleaning for Jacksonville homes, from historic bungalows to new builds.

Concrete Cleaning

Revitalize driveways, patios, and walkways plagued by Florida's heat and humidity.

Roof Cleaning

Learn more →

Deck Restoration

Bring life back to weathered wood surfaces in Jacksonville's harsh climate.

Learn more →

Commercial Power Washing

High-volume cleaning for Jacksonville businesses facing Florida's elements.
